title: Bats: complete a declaration for a mitigation licence application (A13)
body: "As part of an application for a bat mitigation licence, both the applicant and the named ecologist must agree to declarations to confirm that they are aware of and support the application.  The person who completes the online application will need to submit a signed declaration from the applicant, the named ecologist, or both. The declarations required depend on who completes the application.  Submit the right declaration  If the individual applicant completes the online application  They must submit the ecologist declaration.  If the named ecologist completes the online application  They must submit either the:     individual applicant declaration, if the applicant is an individual    company or organisation declaration, if the applicant is a company or organisation    If someone else completes the online application  They must submit the:     individual applicant declaration, if the applicant is an individual    company or organisation declaration, if the applicant is a company or organisation    ecologist declaration    To submit your declaration   Download the relevant document or documents and save to your device. Make sure that each document is completed by the right person, with all the information that is asked for. Upload the completed document when prompted as part of your online bat mitigation licence application.  "
